acceptance_criteria: Boost from Ivory creates a boost post; original author on mastodon.social sees Announce; boost appears in boosting actor's timeline as wrapper post with reblog=original; unboost sends Undo Announce; Status.reblog is full nested Status object not just an ID
description: Implement POST /api/v1/statuses/:id/reblog and /unreblog. Create a new post row that is a boost (boost_of_id or boost_of_uri set). Return a Status object where the outer wrapper has empty content and reblog field points to the original. Enqueue outbound Announce or Undo{Announce} activity.
design: Boost post: new posts row with boost_of_id (local) or boost_of_uri (remote) set, content='', content_html=''. ap_id = new snowflake. Announce activity: {type:Announce, actor:..., object:original_ap_uri, to:[AS2Public]}. Status serialization: outer Status has content='', reblog=full_original_status_object.
title: Boost / unboost endpoints + outbound Announce/Undo Announce
